rationale: Ground truth is essentially just an APPROVE/LGTM with an unrelated aside about splitting out a VoxCPM2 fix, which neither candidate's diff-scoped analysis touches, so recall is capped and equal for both. Both candidates independently reconstruct the same seed-propagation mechanism (serving_speech.py ~3694-3706, gpu_model_runner.py ~1812-1869) with matching line numbers, lending mutual credibility and similar precision. X edges ahead on actionability by proposing a concrete guard-comment addition at a specific line to prevent regression and flagging the inert stage-1 removal, whereas Y's output is mostly a validation/audit log confirming correctness without suggesting any change.
